ogTitle: Wollemi vs Wolli Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wollemi and Wolli Creek.
heading: Wollemi vs Wolli Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wollemi, New South Wales and Wolli Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wollemi has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Wolli Creek (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wollemi or Wolli Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wollemi has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Wolli Creek scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wollemi scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Wolli Creek scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wollemi or Wolli Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wollemi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
